Duplicates.warning: {count, plural, one {# selected transaction was} other {# selected transactions were}} already imported from another source. Importing again will create duplicates.

Install.title: Add Pocket to your home screen
Install.iosHint: To install: tap Share, then “Add to Home Screen”.

Offline.title: You’re offline
Offline.body: Check your connection and try again. Pages you’ve already opened stay available; live prices and data resume once you’re back online.

Landing.heroSub: Stocks, funds, gold and cash across every brokerage — tracked in a single, honest figure.
Landing.signInSub: Use your organisation account, or your email.
Landing.trust: Encrypted in transit · Read-only by default

AuthError.title: Sign-in couldn't complete
AuthError.body: Your sign-in link expired or was already used — this can happen with a stale or duplicate login tab. Try again to start a fresh sign-in.
AuthError.deniedBody: You didn't approve the sign-in request. Try again to continue.

Reports.title: Reports
Reports.subtitle: Statements you can open and export

allocation.title: Allocation & concentration
allocation.desc: How your capital is spread across asset classes, regions and currencies.

rebalancing.title: Rebalancing & targets
rebalancing.desc: Drift from your target mix and where to direct your next top-up.

xirr.label: Annualised return · XIRR
xirr.caption: Money-weighted, net of fees · since Jan {year}

rebalancingCard.title: Rebalancing
rebalancingCard.subtitle: Current vs. target weights · {status}
rebalancingCard.noTargets: No targets set for this scope yet.
rebalancingCard.note: Drift compares your current weights to your saved targets — direct new contributions toward the most under-weight class to converge over time.

diversification.label: Diversification
diversification.caption: {markets, plural, one {# market} other {# markets}} · {currencies, plural, one {# currency} other {# currencies}}

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.subtitle: Server configuration. Visible to admins only.
Admin.providersHint: Enable or disable market-data providers, set their fallback order (top first), and manage API keys.
Admin.updateError: Couldn't save changes. Please try again.
Admin.unavailable: Provider settings are unavailable right now.
Admin.credentialError: Couldn't save the key. Please try again.
Admin.encryptionDisabled: Key management requires DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY to be set
Admin.visionProvidersHint: Configure vision models for screenshot parsing. The highest-priority enabled provider is used. Ollama requires OLLAMA_BASE_URL (or a URL set via DB) to be configured.
Admin.importStrategyHint: Choose the first extraction step for imported screenshots and PDFs. CSV imports are always parsed deterministically and are unaffected.
Admin.importStrategyHint_parser_first: Recognised broker documents (e.g. DKB securities PDFs) are parsed exactly with no AI call; anything else falls back to the vision AI.
Admin.importStrategyHint_vision_only: Every screenshot and PDF is sent to the vision AI. Skips the deterministic parser entirely.
Admin.importStrategyError: Couldn't save the import strategy. Please try again.
Admin.statsHint: Database size and row counts. Object storage is not used — screenshots are parsed in-memory and discarded.
Admin.jobsHint: Scheduled background tasks. Use "Run now" to trigger a job immediately instead of waiting for its next cron tick. Note: cache invalidation only applies to this replica.
Admin.schedulerUnavailable: Scheduler not running (pg-boss requires an external Postgres; not available in this environment).
Admin.jobTriggerFailed: Could not queue job. Is the scheduler running?
Admin.jobPollTimedOut: Still running; refresh to check status.
Admin.storageHint: Configure the storage backend (S3-compatible or local folder), manage credentials, and view usage stats.
Admin.storageEncryptionRequired: Encryption key (DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY) required to store credentials.

Income.title: Income
Income.subtitle: Dividends, coupons & distributions
Income.assumptionsBase: Projected from each holding's historical payment cadence.
Income.assumptionsGrowth: Per-share amounts grown at each holding's YoY rate.
Income.assumptionsContributions: Assumes savings-plan purchases continue at their recent rate.
Income.emptyBody: Dividends and coupons appear here once you record them as transactions.
Income.heatmapDefaultSubtitle: Tap a cell to see the month's income

Savings.title: Savings
Savings.subtitle: Contributions, plans & forecast
Savings.monthsElapsed: {count, plural, one {# month since start} other {# months since start}}
Savings.xirrYoungHint: * annualised from under a year — may overstate
Savings.chartValueUnavailable: Value history not yet available — run a backfill from Admin → Jobs.
Savings.contributionsSubtitle: What you put in vs. what it's worth · since {date}
Savings.forecastSubtitle: Project the value if you keep saving at an assumed annual return.
Savings.projectedInYears: Projected in {count, plural, one {# year} other {# years}}
Savings.emptyBody: Record deposits or savings-plan purchases and your saving progress appears here.
Savings.stoppedPlans: {count, plural, one {# stopped plan} other {# stopped plans}}
Savings.cashNudgeSuggestion: A money-market fund at ~{rate} p.a. would earn about {amount}/yr.
Savings.forecastAssumptions: if you keep adding {amount}/mo at {rate} p.a.

Portfolios.title: Portfolios
Portfolios.subtitle: Create and manage your portfolios.
Portfolios.aggregateSubtitle: {amount} aggregate · {count, plural, one {# portfolio} other {# portfolios}}
Portfolios.empty: No portfolios yet — create your first one.

AccountHolders.title: Account holders
AccountHolders.subtitle: People your portfolios belong to. Defined once and shared — birth year and child status live here.
AccountHolders.error: Couldn't save the holder. Please try again.
AccountHolders.deleteWarning: Portfolios using this holder will become unassigned.
AccountHolders.taxAllowanceHint: The per-person legal ceiling: €1,000 for single filers; €2,000 for jointly-assessed couples. The actual allocation per depot is set in each portfolio's settings.
AccountHolders.capitalGainsTaxRateHint: 0.25 (25% KapSt) or 0.26375 incl. Soli. Adjust for your marginal rate.

PortfolioForm.subtitle: Give it a name and a base currency to value it in.
PortfolioForm.name: Portfolio name
PortfolioForm.accountHolderHint: Who this portfolio belongs to. Child status and birth year come from the holder.
PortfolioForm.birthYearHint: Used for the “to age 18” savings forecast.
PortfolioForm.error: Couldn't save the portfolio. Please try again.
PortfolioForm.deleteWarning: {count, plural, =0 {This permanently deletes the portfolio.} one {This permanently deletes the portfolio and its # transaction.} other {This permanently deletes the portfolio and its # transactions.}}
PortfolioForm.deleteRelatedNote: Related documents, loans and history are also removed. This cannot be undone.
PortfolioForm.includeInAggregateHint: Count this portfolio toward your total net worth.
PortfolioForm.cashCounted: Cash is part of this portfolio
PortfolioForm.cashCountedHint: Count idle cash toward net worth — for savings/deposit accounts, not brokerage or checking.
PortfolioForm.allowNegativeCashHint: Silence the warning when a buy briefly posts before its funding deposit clears.
PortfolioForm.documentRetentionHint: Keep uploaded PDFs and screenshots after parsing so you can re-download them.
PortfolioForm.taxAllowanceAnnualHint: Optional. The amount of your Sparerpauschbetrag allocated to this depot. Kapitalertragsteuer is withheld only once this amount is used up.
PortfolioForm.taxAllowanceHelper: €{allocated} of €{cap} cap allocated across {holder}'s depots — €{remaining} left
PortfolioForm.taxAllowanceOverAllocated: Total allocation exceeds the €{cap} cap. The excess will be reconciled at year-end via Anlage KAP.
PortfolioForm.trConnectAfterSave: Save the portfolio first to set up the Trade Republic connection.
PortfolioForm.trChildUnsupported: Trade Republic can't sync child accounts (Kinderdepot) yet — import via CSV or PDF instead.

Import.subtitle: Upload a screenshot or CSV — review the draft, then confirm.

issues.attention: {count, plural, one {# event needs attention} other {# events need attention}}

review.duplicateNotice: {count, plural, one {# draft looks like it was already imported} other {# drafts look like they were already imported}} and won't be added by Confirm. To add one anyway, select it and use "Confirm selected".

accountMismatch.otherPortfolio: This file (account {account}) looks like it belongs to "{portfolio}". Import into the selected portfolio anyway?
accountMismatch.noMatch: The account number on this file ({account}) doesn't match the selected portfolio. Import anyway?

done.title: Imported
done.hint: {count, plural, one {# transaction added} other {# transactions added}} to your portfolio.
done.excludedCash: {count, plural, one {# cash movement was excluded} other {# cash movements were excluded}} — this is an invest-only portfolio (cash is outside its boundary).

errors.notConfigured: No vision parser is configured yet. Add an API key to enable screenshot import.
errors.parseFailed: Couldn't read that file. Try a clearer image or enter it manually.
errors.tooLarge: That file is too large (max 25 MB). Please compress it and try again.
errors.fileRead: Couldn't read that file. Please try again.
errors.noDrafts: No transactions were found in that file.
errors.alreadyConfirmed: This file was already imported and confirmed. Re-import it if you've since deleted some of those transactions.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please retry — you may need to sign in again.
errors.rateLimited: The {provider} parser hit its rate or usage limit. Wait a moment and retry.
errors.providerAuth: The {provider} parser rejected its API key. Check the provider settings.
errors.providerDown: The {provider} parser is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly.
errors.portfolioRequired: Choose a portfolio to import into.

confirmPortfolio.matched: Pre-selected from the account number in this file.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Your net worth across every portfolio.

Empty.unavailableBody: Sign in and make sure the API server is running, then refresh.
Empty.noPortfolioBody: Create a portfolio and add transactions to start tracking your holdings.
Empty.noHoldingsBody: Add a buy transaction — by screenshot, CSV or manually — to see positions here.
Empty.noTransactionsBody: Import a screenshot or CSV, or add a transaction manually, to get started.
Empty.historyBody: Performance history appears once daily prices are collected.
Empty.noMoversBody: Day changes appear once live prices refresh for your holdings.

Error.title: Something went wrong
Error.body: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.

Instrument.noHistory: No price history yet — it appears with a configured market-data source.
Instrument.notFoundBody: It may have been removed, or the API is unavailable.
Instrument.noPositionBody: You don't currently hold this instrument in the selected scope.
Instrument.noTransactionsBody: No transactions for this instrument in the selected scope.
Instrument.incomeEmpty: No income recorded for this position yet.

CorpAction.title: Record a corporate action
CorpAction.subtitle: Apply a split, bonus or rights issue to an instrument.
CorpAction.scopeHint: A corporate action is recorded once and applies to the instrument across every portfolio that holds it.
CorpAction.scopeHintFor: Recorded once — this applies to {symbol} across every portfolio that holds it.
CorpAction.ratioHint: e.g. 2 for a 2:1 split, 0.1 for a 1:10 bonus
CorpAction.needInstrument: Search for and select an instrument first.
CorpAction.error: Couldn't record the action. Check the fields and try again.
CorpAction.notInPortfolios: {symbol} was found in market data but is not in your portfolios yet. Import a transaction for it first.

Merger.subtitle: Convert a holding from one ISIN to another (Fondsverschmelzung), carrying cost basis.
Merger.search: Search by symbol, name or ISIN
Merger.taxable: Taxable merger (realise the gain at market value)
Merger.marketValueHint: Total value of the position at the merger — taxable mergers only.
Merger.needInstruments: Select both the old and the new instrument.
Merger.error: Couldn't record the merger. Check the fields and try again.

Search.hint: Type to search instruments and transactions.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.subtitle: Your account and preferences.
Settings.name: Name
Settings.portfoliosDesc: Accounts, brokerage connections and account holders.
Settings.adminDesc: Providers, imports, storage, jobs and stats.
Settings.displayCurrencyHint: Net worth and totals are shown in this currency.
Settings.updateError: Couldn't save changes. Please try again.
Settings.tokensHint: Personal access tokens let scripts and tools call the API as you. Read-only by default; keep them secret and revoke any you no longer use.
Settings.tokensError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Settings.tokensCreatedWarning: Copy it now — it won't be shown again.
Settings.navPortfoliosCount: {portfolios, plural, one {# portfolio} other {# portfolios}} · {holders, plural, one {# holder} other {# holders}}
Settings.investingCostBasisNote: How P&L cost is calculated — Total paid includes fees.
Settings.investingTaxNoteDe: Sparerpauschbetrag allowance tracking, Abgeltungsteuer estimates and harvest suggestions on the Tax screen.
Settings.investingTaxNoteId: Flat 0.1% tax on share sales and 10% on dividends, both withheld at source — see the Tax screen.
Settings.dataSourceImportHint: Always available — parse broker screenshots, PDFs or CSV exports.

Chart.collectingIntraday: Collecting intraday data — check back after markets are open.

Transactions.title: Activity
Transactions.subtitle: Every buy, sell, dividend and cash flow.

sourcesSection.title: Data sources
sourcesSection.fullDetailBadge: Full tax breakdown available from settlement PDF.
sourcesSection.notRetained: The original document was not stored. To keep imported files, enable document retention in the portfolio settings.

reassign.title: Reassign to portfolio
reassign.description: Move these transactions to another portfolio. Holdings and contributions follow them.
reassign.successWithSkips: Moved {moved}; skipped {skipped} already in the target.
reassign.none: Nothing moved — already in the target portfolio.

addMenu.title: Add to portfolio
addMenu.subtitle: Transactions are the source of truth — pick how to add them.
addMenu.screenshotDesc: AI reads your broker app — IDX, Trade Republic, anything
addMenu.csvDesc: From any broker export — columns mapped automatically

portfolio.title: Create a portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Give it a name and a base currency to value it in.
portfolio.name: Portfolio name
portfolio.error: Couldn't create the portfolio. Please try again.
portfolio.needFirst: Create a portfolio first to start adding transactions.

tx.title: Add a transaction
tx.subtitle: Record a trade, dividend or cash movement.
tx.search: Search by symbol, name, or ISIN
tx.noResults: No matches — add it as a new instrument below.
tx.discoveredResults: From market data — tap to auto-fill
tx.name: Name
tx.error: Couldn't save the transaction. Check the fields and try again.
tx.symbolRequired: Enter a symbol, or pick a match above.
tx.goldLabelPlaceholder: e.g. Antam 5g bar, Pegadaian Tabungan Emas
tx.goldNote: Valued by the gram at the chosen source's buyback price.
tx.enrichHint: Upload the settlement PDF to add the full tax breakdown.
tx.transferBasisHint: Enter the original purchase price per share. Leave at 0 to set later — a missing basis creates a phantom unrealized gain.

TradeRepublic.title: Trade Republic
TradeRepublic.subtitle: Connect your Trade Republic account to import your transactions.
TradeRepublic.wafTokenHint: Paste this from your browser only if automatic connection fails.
TradeRepublic.approveTitle: Approve the login in your app
TradeRepublic.approveHint: Open Trade Republic on your phone and approve the login request. If you don't see it, fully close and reopen the app.
TradeRepublic.approvalError: The login wasn't approved in time. Please try again.
TradeRepublic.connectedHint: Your account is connected. Sync pulls new activity as draft transactions you confirm.
TradeRepublic.synced: Synced — {drafts} draft transactions staged. Review them on the Import page.
TradeRepublic.syncQueued: Sync started — new transactions will appear shortly.

scope.title: What gets imported
scope.cashInside: Savings portfolio: all activity is imported — trades, dividends, interest, corporate actions, and cash movements (deposits, withdrawals and card spending).
scope.cashOutside: Invest-only portfolio: trades, dividends, interest and corporate actions are imported. Cash movements (deposits, withdrawals, card spending) are excluded to keep the cash boundary clean. Change this in the portfolio's “Cash is part of this portfolio” setting.

reprocess.done: Done — tax and fee details updated from stored settlement PDFs.

reimport.warning: This deletes all Trade Republic transactions in this portfolio and re-stages the full timeline to confirm again. Manual edits to those rows are lost.

TradeRepublic.expiredHint: Your session expired. Reconnect to resume syncing.
TradeRepublic.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
TradeRepublic.boundElsewhere: This Trade Republic account is connected to another portfolio. Connecting here will move it to this portfolio.

errors.pytr_not_available: Trade Republic sync isn't set up on the server.
errors.encryption_required: The server can't store credentials securely yet (encryption key missing).
errors.tr_pairing_failed: Couldn't start the Trade Republic login. Please try again.
errors.portfolio_not_found: That portfolio could no longer be found.
errors.not_connected: Not connected. Reconnect and try again.

InteractiveBrokers.title: Interactive Brokers
InteractiveBrokers.subtitle: Connect your IBKR account via a Flex Web Service token to import transactions automatically.
InteractiveBrokers.setupHint: Create an Activity Flex Query in the IBKR portal (Reports → Flex Queries), then generate a Flex Web Service token (Settings → Flex Web Service). Include Trades, Cash Transactions, Open Positions, Transfers, and Corporate Actions in the query.
InteractiveBrokers.connectedHint: Your account is connected. Sync pulls new activity as draft transactions you confirm.
InteractiveBrokers.syncQueued: Sync started — new transactions will appear shortly.
InteractiveBrokers.expiredHint: Your Flex token has expired. Generate a new token in the IBKR portal and reconnect.
InteractiveBrokers.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

reimport.warning: This deletes all Interactive Brokers transactions in this portfolio and re-stages the full timeline to confirm again. Manual edits to those rows are lost.

errors.encryption_required: The server can't store credentials securely yet (encryption key missing).
errors.not_connected: Not connected. Reconnect and try again.

Trades.title: Realized P&L
Trades.subtitle: Closed trades & performance
Trades.annualizedTooltip: Money-weighted return (IRR). Reflects when each amount was invested — for savings plans this exceeds total return ÷ calendar period because capital was deployed gradually.
Trades.avgHeldTooltip: Capital-weighted average holding period. Shorter than the calendar period when purchases were spread over time (e.g. savings plans).
Trades.bonusesNote: Broker-credited rewards (Kindergeld, saveback, free shares). Not counted in total return.
Trades.emptyBody: Buy an instrument and your positions will show up here as trades.
Trades.taxDisclaimer: Indicative figures for your own tracking — not an official tax statement. Foreign-currency amounts are converted at the latest rate, not each transaction's date.

TargetDialog.title: Set target allocation — {dimension}
TargetDialog.description: Enter your desired allocation percentage for each slice. The total must equal 100%.
TargetDialog.saveError: Failed to save targets. Please try again.

RebalanceDialog.title: Target split for savings plans
RebalanceDialog.description: Set your desired allocation across savings plans. We'll recommend how to split your monthly contribution to converge toward these targets.
RebalanceDialog.toggleDisabled: Configure a Sparerpauschbetrag for this portfolio's holder to enable

Tax.title: Tax
Tax.subtitle: Capital gains & tax-free harvest suggestions

empty.title: No FSA allocation configured
empty.description: Add a Freistellungsauftrag (FSA) allocation to at least one portfolio in its settings to see headroom and harvest suggestions.

distribution.title: FSA distribution across depots
distribution.overAllocated: Total depot allocation exceeds the personal cap. The excess withholding will be reconciled at year-end via Anlage KAP.

forecast.label: Expected dividends & coupons
forecast.disclaimer: Gross estimates (pre-tax, before deducting withholding) based on last year's payments and announced dates. The income page shows net cash received — the difference is withholding tax.

harvest.title: Harvest suggestions
harvest.subtitle: Open positions you could partially sell to use up remaining allowance tax-free. Sized against your projected remaining allowance (accounts for expected dividends & coupons).
harvest.subtitleNoForecast: Open positions you could partially sell to use up remaining allowance tax-free.
harvest.summary: Harvest all {count} to offset {offset} of realized gains — about ~{saving} saved. Germany has no 30-day wash-sale rule, so you can buy back immediately.

disposals.title: Realized gains · Abgeltungsteuer
disposals.subtitle: Gross figures, before Teilfreistellung — the hero card above is Tf-adjusted.

Tax.footnote: Germany taxes investment income at a flat {rate}% (Abgeltungsteuer + Solidaritätszuschlag). Your {allowance} Sparer-Pauschbetrag is applied first, then losses offset gains within the same year. Estimate only, not tax advice.

regime.label: Tax regime · applies everywhere, also in Settings

id.subtitle: Indonesian final tax · {year}

hero.estimatedTaxDesc: Withheld at source — nothing to file

id.footnote: Indonesia applies a final 0.1% tax on listed-share sales and 10% on dividends, both withheld at source — so there's nothing extra to file, and no losses to harvest. This is an estimate, not tax advice.

Anomalies.bannerError: {count, plural, one {# data error} other {# data errors}} found
Anomalies.bannerWarning: {count, plural, one {# data warning} other {# data warnings}} found
Anomalies.bannerBoth: {errors, plural, one {# error} other {# errors}} and {warnings, plural, one {# warning} other {# warnings}} found in your data

codes.oversell: Oversell: sold more than available quantity
codes.sell_before_acquisition: Sell before acquisition: no shares held at this date
codes.income_on_non_held: Income on instrument not held at this date
codes.missing_transfer_basis: Missing cost basis: transfer-in price is 0 — set the carried cost
codes.zero_price: Zero price: buy or sell recorded at €0
codes.reconciliation_gap: Cash reconciliation gap vs. broker ({currency}: reported {reported}, derived {derived})
codes.reconciliation_drift: New cash reconciliation drift vs. broker ({currency}: reported {reported}, derived {derived})
codes.position_gap: Position reconciliation gap vs. broker ({isin}: reported {reported}, derived {derived})

unmappedTypes.title: {count, plural, one {# unmapped Trade Republic event type} other {# unmapped Trade Republic event types}}
unmappedTypes.description: These reached the importer but have no mapping yet, so they're excluded from your balances until added to the mapper.
